body.title: Model eval harness: same task, all provider/model stacks
body.result: EvaluatorDevice.model_eval_run() + devices/inference/capability_graph.py — runs task against N models, records quality/cost/latency in adc.model_eval_results, queryable via InferenceDevice.capability_graph_query()
body.description:
Build an evaluation harness that takes a programming task and runs it against multiple model stacks simultaneously: Anthropic (Opus 4.8/Sonnet 4.6/Haiku 4.5), GPT (GPT-4o/Llama3.1-70B/GPT-4o-mini), Qwen stack, etc. Records result quality, latency, and cost per combination. Results stored in inference proxy's capability graph (T-inference-proxy-mini-rack). Goal: characterise which model is best for which task class.

**Affected files:** devices/evaluator/ (extend), devices/inference/ (capability graph), TBD
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** In scope: harness runner, result recording, cost tracking. Out of scope: runtime selection (T-runtime-model-selection), UI.
**Completion criteria:** Run one programming task against 3+ model stacks, results recorded with cost and quality score. Data queryable from inference proxy.
